note: Per-field fill-value guidance (value type, required-ness, choice-group conditionals). Derived offline from schema/mapping/constraints; consistent with the fill engine. Not legal advice — verify against the official form before filing. Currency/time guidance is conservative because the printed '$'/AM-PM are not read here.

plaintiff.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

defendants.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

undefined.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

location_town.guidance: The court division / town where the case is filed.

1_i.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

2_i.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

undefined_2.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

printed_name_and_bar_number_if_applicabl.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

address_1.guidance: A street address; include the street line. City/State/ZIP may belong in their own boxes — check the printed labels.

address_2.guidance: A city or town name only (no state or ZIP).
